focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor win
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor and it was a big win. Worth acknowledging their contribution to boost morale.

focus_points.label: Checking in on their mood this week
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week and quieter than usual in standup. Could be fatigue, a temporary dip, or something else — worth exploring.

focus_points.label: Interest in mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned wanting to do more mentoring, which hasn't been discussed in a few months. Could be a good time to explore how that fits into their growth.

focus_points.label: Upcoming billing rewrite involvement
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Worth clarifying expectations and alignment.

focus_points.label: Any blockers on current tasks
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in topic. It's important to ensure there are no hidden obstacles affecting their work.
